fidelity.fault_injection_accuracy: PASS: fault_injections is intentionally empty because FM-17 here targets callback/postprocessor behavior (WorkerRetryPlugin + BUG-13 suppression), not HTTP fault classes (tests_rlm_adk/fixtures/provider_fake/structured_output_batched_k3_multi_retry.json:243; rlm_adk/callbacks/worker_retry.py:51-71,190-209).
